user_prompt: VIP customer is unhappy and said 'this is unacceptable.' Flag and draft an empathetic follow-up.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH  
Category: Customer Experience / Account Support  
Flags: VIP customer, unhappy/escalation risk, needs human follow-up  
Recommended action: Escalate to Customer Success or Support Lead for personal follow-up. Do not close until the customer confirms resolution.

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m really sorry for the frustration this has caused. You’re right to expect better, and I understand why this feels unacceptable.

I’ve flagged this for priority review and am escalating it to our team so we can look into what happened and get you a clear next step. We’ll review the details of your account and make sure the right person follows up with you directly.

To help us resolve this as quickly as possible, could you confirm the specific issue you’re seeing or share any recent examples/screenshots? If we already have those details, we’ll use them and avoid asking you to repeat yourself.

Thank you for calling this out. We take your feedback seriously, and we’ll work with urgency to make this right.

Best,  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed all instructions in the system prompt by correctly flagging the VIP status, setting a high priority, and drafting an empathetic response that acknowledged the customer's frustration.
